messages.content: You are the SJ Project Planner Agent. Analyze unstructured meeting notes, emails, and conversations, then extract project updates into a structured response. Output STRICT JSON only as an object with keys: source_date_iso, project_timezone, tasks. source_date_iso must be in YYYY-MM-DD and anchored to the source text date. project_timezone must be an IANA timezone string (use Asia/Singapore unless another timezone is explicitly provided). tasks must be an array of task objects using snake_case keys only: task, owner, due_date_raw, due_date_iso, status, dependency, action_type, source, confidence. Do not use spaces in key names. due_date_raw preserves the original phrasing from source text. due_date_iso must be YYYY-MM-DD when confidently resolvable from source_date_iso, else null. Do NOT add any due_date_resolution field. Allowed action_type values: new_task, update, conflict_needs_clarification. Use null for unknown dependency, Unassigned for unknown owner, and Unspecified for unknown due_date_raw. Allowed status values: Not Started, In Progress, Blocked, Delayed, Done, Paused, At Risk, Unknown. Keep values concise and deterministic for downstream programmatic updates (for example, plan/Gantt updates). Confidence should reflect extraction and date-normalization certainty (High, Medium, Low).

Meeting Notes - SJ Campus Aquila-X Command Centre
Date: Oct 12
Attendees: Sarah (Digital Lead), John (Systems Engineer), David (BIM Coordinator), Emma (O&M Manager)
Notes: Sarah mentioned she has started the UI/UX wireframes for the new 5G Integrated Command Centre dashboard and expects to finish them by next Wednesday. John is currently blocked on the BMS (Building Management System) sensor integration because we don't have the final digital twin data mapping yet. David agreed to take ownership of finalizing the digital twin mapping and promised to submit it to the SO (Superintending Officer) by this Friday. Emma asked about the cybersecurity audit required for our BCA Green Mark Platinum submission; no one is assigned yet, but we need it done before the end of the month to avoid TOP (Temporary Occupation Permit) delays.

Email Thread - Tuas Mega Port Phase 2 Marine Works
From: Mike (Resident Engineer)
To: EPC Project Delivery Team
Date: Nov 4
Subject: Delay in caisson installation at Berth 12

Hi team, 
Just a heads up, the heavy-lift crane barge had a mechanical breakdown today during the morning shift. We won't be able to finish installing the remaining caissons for Berth 12 until Nov 8th now (originally planned for Nov 5th). Also, because of this delay, Lisa's reclamation sand infill works will need to be pushed back. Lisa, can you confirm with the dredging contractor if you can commence the infill on Nov 10th instead without incurring standing time?

Thanks,
Mike

{"source_date_iso":"2026-11-04","project_timezone":"Asia/Singapore","tasks":[{"task":"Caisson installation at Berth 12","owner":"Mike","status":"Delayed","dependency":"Crane barge repair","action_type":"update","source":"Email Thread - Nov 4","confidence":"High","due_date_raw":"Nov 8","due_date_iso":"2026-11-08"},{"task":"Reclamation sand infill works","owner":"Lisa","status":"Delayed","dependency":"Caisson installation at Berth 12","action_type":"conflict_needs_clarification","source":"Email Thread - Nov 4","confidence":"Medium","due_date_raw":"Nov 10 (Pending Confirmation)","due_date_iso":"2026-11-10"}]}

Meeting Notes - Changi T5 Substructure Works
Date: Jan 15
Attendees: Robert, Wei Ting, Ali
Notes: Robert reported that the deep excavation for the baggage handling tunnel is 80% complete but heavy rain has paused works. Expected resumption is this Thursday. Wei Ting needs to submit the revised strutting design to BCA by next Tuesday, but she is waiting for soil test results from Ali. Ali says the geotechnical lab will send the results by Friday morning.

Email Thread - Woodlands Health Campus MEP Clash
From: James (Lead Architect)
To: MEP Engineering Team
Date: Feb 2
Hi all, the latest BIM clash detection showed a major interference between the HVAC ducting and the medical gas pipelines on Level 4 of the acute care wing. Sarah, please coordinate with the MEP contractor to resolve this model clash by Feb 10. We cannot proceed with the ceiling works until this is sorted. Can someone confirm who is handling the acoustic baffle installation in that same zone?

Meeting Notes - Snowy 2.0 TBM Florence (SMEC)
Date: Mar 10
Attendees: Liam, Chloe, Ben
Notes: Liam confirmed TBM (Tunnel Boring Machine) Florence has restarted excavation and is advancing at 15m per day. Chloe mentioned the tunnel lining precast segments are running low at the staging area; she will expedite the next delivery for Monday. Ben raised a concern about the geological fault line ahead; we need a geotechnical sign-off before Friday to proceed safely.

Message from Site Group Chat - Tengah HDB BTO
Date: Apr 5
Ken (Project Manager): Hi team, PPVC (Prefinished Precast Volumetric Construction) module lifting for Block 211 is suspended due to high winds today. We will push the schedule to tomorrow, Apr 6. Aisyah, please update the crane operator roster. Also, the facade painting for Block 210 is done. Outstanding: who is inspecting the painting works before we dismantle the gondolas?

Email Thread - Tengeh Reservoir Floating Solar
From: Daniel (Marine Engineer)
To: Sustainability Delivery Group
Date: May 12
Subject: Mooring line tension tests
Team, the initial tension tests on the main HDPE floats failed the safety threshold. We need to recalibrate the anchoring weights. I will lead the recalibration by May 15. The PV panel installation by the EPC contractor will be halted until I give the green light. Please inform the contractor.

Meeting Notes - Kigali Innovation City Masterplan Phase 1
Date: Jun 20
Attendees: Grace, Paul, Joy
Notes: Grace noted the final zoning maps are complete. Paul needs to integrate the wastewater treatment plant location into the GIS database by Wednesday. Joy mentioned the presentation to the Ministry of Infrastructure is scheduled for next Friday, but we are missing the final cost estimates. Paul agreed to follow up with the QS (Quantity Surveyor) team to get the estimates by Monday.

Email - Checkpoint Gamma Smart Surveillance (AETOS)
From: Capt. Raj (AETOS Operations)
To: IT Systems Team
Date: Jul 8
The installation of the facial recognition cameras at Lane 4 and 5 is complete. However, network integration is pending. Mark, can you configure the firewall rules by tomorrow? Also, we still need a trainer for the guard shift on Friday to teach them the new UI. Please advise who is available.

Meeting Notes - NSE Corridor Viaduct (LTA Project)
Date: Aug 14
Attendees: Sam (Resident Engineer), Wei (Contractor PM)
Notes: Segment launching for span 5 is delayed because the temporary formwork failed the safety inspection yesterday. Wei's team will rectify the formwork by Aug 18. Sam will conduct the re-inspection on Aug 19. The road closure permit needs to be extended, but no one has applied for it yet.
